name: CTO Platform Lifecycle Test - AlertHub E2E
description: End-to-end test using the AlertHub multi-platform notification system, which exercises all agents (Rex, Nova, Grizz, Blaze, Tap, Spark) and their respective tech stacks

userStories.title: Pre-Flight: Verify Local Services
userStories.description: Start local services with 'just mp' and verify they are healthy. Run 'just preflight' for comprehensive check.
acceptanceCriteria: Run 'just mp' to start all services (or verify mprocs already running)
Healer Play API returns 200: curl http://localhost:8083/health
Run 'just preflight' and verify output shows '✅ PRE-FLIGHT PASSED'

userStories.title: Pre-Flight: Verify Tunnels and Webhooks
userStories.description: Ensure Cloudflare tunnels are up and GitHub webhooks point to dev
acceptanceCriteria: PM webhook URL accessible: curl https://pm-dev.5dlabs.ai/health returns 200
GitHub webhook points to pm-dev.5dlabs.ai (just webhook-status)
Linear webhook configured with correct URL

userStories.title: Pre-Flight: Verify Credentials (OAuth)
userStories.description: Ensure all required OAuth credentials are in .env.local. We use OAuth tokens (not API key) for Linear.
acceptanceCriteria: .env.local exists at project root with secrets
LINEAR_OAUTH_TOKEN is set (NOT LINEAR_API_KEY - OAuth is required)
'just preflight' section 5 (AGENT OAUTH) shows all agents with '✓ token'

userStories.title: Intake: Submit AlertHub PRD via MCP Tool
userStories.description: Use your cto-mcp server to intake the AlertHub E2E test project. Read PRD from tests/intake/alerthub-e2e-test/prd.md
acceptanceCriteria: Tool returns success with Linear project URL
Linear project created with 'AlertHub' in name
PRD content visible in Linear issue description
Argo Workflow 'intake-*' triggered (kubectl get workflows -n cto)

userStories.title: Intake: Verify Task Generation
userStories.description: Verify AI generates tasks with correct structure including testStrategy
acceptanceCriteria: Intake runs in CLI mode (not API mode)
tasks.json created with all required fields
testStrategy field non-empty for each task
Agent hints assigned via content-based routing

userStories.title: Intake: Verify Auto-Append Deploy Task
userStories.description: Verify final Bolt deploy task is auto-appended when config enabled
acceptanceCriteria: Final deploy task exists in tasks.json
Deploy task has all other tasks as dependencies
Deploy task assigned to bolt agent

userStories.title: Intake: Verify Linear Sync
userStories.description: Edit Linear issue and verify task files update in GitHub
acceptanceCriteria: Edit issue title in Linear → task title updated
Edit acceptance criteria in Linear → acceptance.md updated
Changes appear as commit in target repo

userStories.title: Play: Verify CodeRun Creation
userStories.description: Verify CodeRun CR created with correct configuration
acceptanceCriteria: CodeRun CR created in correct namespace
Agent correctly assigned from task agent_hint
Agent app assigned to Linear issue
Two-way communication enabled via Linear dialog

userStories.title: Play: Verify Skills Loading
userStories.description: Verify skills copied to native skill directory for Claude
acceptanceCriteria: Agent-specific skills loaded based on mapping
Log shows skills summary with loaded count

userStories.title: Play: Verify Two-Way Communication
userStories.description: Test bidirectional communication through Linear agent dialog
acceptanceCriteria: Agent activities appear in Linear issue timeline
User can send message via Linear input
Agent receives and processes Linear input
Agent signals (errors, completions) logged in Linear

userStories.title: Play: Verify Subagent Dispatch
userStories.description: Verify coordinator spawns subagents for subtasks

userStories.title: Play: Verify Tool Usage
userStories.description: Verify configured tools are being used and logged
acceptanceCriteria: Tools defined in cto-config.json appear in agent context
Tools showing up in logs as being invoked
MCP servers started for local tools
Tool filtering working correctly per agent

userStories.title: Play: Verify Model Rotation
userStories.description: Test retry with model rotation between Opus and Sonnet
acceptanceCriteria: On retry, model rotates to Opus
Model name appears correctly in logs
Both models can complete the task

userStories.title: Quality: Verify Cleo Review
userStories.description: Verify Cleo performs language-specific quality checks
acceptanceCriteria: CodeRun created for Cleo with job: review
Context7 access configured for documentation lookup
Review comments posted to PR if issues found

userStories.title: Quality: Verify Tess Testing
userStories.description: Verify Tess reads test strategy and runs appropriate tests
acceptanceCriteria: CodeRun created for Tess with job: test
Tess references test strategy in planning
Unit tests written/run for new code

userStories.title: Merge: Verify Atlas Integration
userStories.description: Verify Atlas merges PR after all checks pass

userStories.title: Deploy: Verify Bolt Final Deployment
userStories.description: Verify Bolt deploys application to production

userStories.title: Telemetry: Verify Logs and Metrics
userStories.description: Verify all expected telemetry was captured
acceptanceCriteria: Agent invocation logs captured in Loki
All agents logged activities to Linear timeline
